final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster / PPT cover slide for a domestic China roadshow announcing the launch of GPT-5.5, presented by Sam Altman, styled to match Chinese GP (general partner / institutional investor) fundraising pitch deck aesthetics.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial illustration blended with sleek Chinese tech-finance presentation design, sharp typography, polished corporate pitch deck cover
Composition: centered layout, bold headline at top third, speaker name and title at bottom, logo mark centered or upper-left, generous white space with structured grid
Subject: GPT-5.5 launch announcement cover slide — headline text "GPT-5.5 正式发布", sub-headline "开启新智能时代", speaker credit "演讲人：奥特曼 Sam Altman"
Scene/backdrop: abstract deep navy or midnight blue gradient background with subtle glowing circuit or neural-network line art, evoking cutting-edge AI and institutional gravitas
Lighting/mood: cool blue and electric teal ambient glow, confident and forward-looking, premium institutional tone matching Chinese GP roadshow culture
Color palette: deep navy as dominant base, electric teal and gold as accent colors, white for primary text — palette signals trust, innovation, and capital-market credibility
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5 正式发布" as main headline; "演讲人：奥特曼" as speaker line
Constraints: layout must read as a Chinese domestic roadshow PPT cover (16:9 widescreen); typography hierarchy must be clear at projector scale; no cluttered decoration
Avoid: Western startup minimalism, generic tech blue gradients without structure, cartoon illustration style, watermarks, lorem ipsum placeholder text, overly decorative motifs inconsistent with GP institutional tone
